summary: packages/desktop/native/ directory does not exist — mac_window.node and swift-build/ unbundlable
details: electron-builder.config.ts lines 36-41 reference native/ directory (mac_window.node, swift-build/) as extraResources, but the directory does not exist on disk. This means the macOS window native module and Swift build artifacts cannot be bundled into packaged builds. The feature either silently fails at runtime or was never implemented.

summary: No uncaughtException/unhandledRejection handler in Electron main process
details: The Electron main process (index.ts) has no global error handler. If any unhandled error or rejection occurs, the process crashes silently with no diagnostic log. This is a user-facing reliability risk — the app can disappear without explanation.

summary: Global health endpoint is a stub — always returns {healthy: true}
details: The GET /global/health endpoint always returns {healthy: true, version: ...} regardless of actual database connectivity or sidecar state. It performs no real health checks. This makes the desktop health polling (server.ts checkHealth) effectively useless — it always passes even when the server is degraded.
